title: Phra Ruang: Rise of the Empire
original_title: พระร่วง มหาศึกสุโขทัย
overview: The tale of a confrontation with a formidable enemy, poised to seize the throne. It is time for the two kings to set aside their differences and unite in order to protect and preserve their kingdom.
